caption: In a room featuring a table covered with a palm tree-themed mat, a person's hands are shown interacting with sports cards. The person, wearing a dark shirt, is seen in a small inset window in the background. The scene is branded with the "JASPYS" logo and the text "CASEBREAKS.COM". In the sequence, a pair of hands reaches for a yellow card protector resting on a stack of white boxes. The hands lift the yellow protector, revealing a baseball card inside. As the protector is removed, the card is displayed, featuring a portrait of a player and a signature that reads "Rod Carew". The card also contains the printed name "ROD CAREW" and a numbering sequence "111/25". The background includes various sports card supplies and equipment on the table.
